description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body, predominantly covered in dark gray to black feathers. Its head and upper back display a striking yellow coloration, which extends in a patchy manner onto the wings and tail. The bird has a short, pointed beak and a subtle, rounded eye visible on the side of the head. The wings are folded tightly against the body, and the tail is long and tapers to a point, with a slight yellow marking near the base. The legs are short and dark, barely visible beneath the body. The overall appearance suggests a bird adapted for perching and agile flight, with a vivid contrast between the yellow and dark plumage.
description: A small, streamlined bird with dark gray-black plumage and vivid yellow markings on the head, back, and tail, featuring a pointed beak and long, tapered tail.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's pointed beak, yellow head, and long, dark tail with yellow highlights.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the yellow patch on the back and the overall slender, elongated body shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the same yellow and dark color pattern, with the beak and eye visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail's pointed shape and the yellow marking at the base of the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid black body with bright yellow head and upper back, yellow patch on tail base
